dashboard.subtitle: What do you want to accomplish today?
dashboard.newProjectDesc: Guided assistant to structure your thesis
dashboard.noProjects: You don't have any projects yet.
dashboard.startFirst: Start your first manuscript by clicking 'New Project'
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

wizard.title: New Manuscript
wizard.step1Desc: Let's start by defining the intellectual framework of your research.
wizard.step2Desc: Specify your methodological expectations and sources.
wizard.step3Desc: The AI will now structure your work.

placeholders.subject: Ex: The impact of artificial intelligence on copyright in Europe...
placeholders.instructions: Ex: I want an empirical approach...
placeholders.referenceText: Paste text excerpts, notes or a bibliography here...

wizard.step3Subtitle: Define the ambition and depth of your document.
wizard.adviceText: The AI will generate content section by section to ensure consistency.
wizard.adviceMemoire: A minimum of 60 pages is recommended for a Master's degree.
wizard.adviceArticle: A scientific article is generally between 10 and 20 pages.
wizard.adviceTp: A TP is generally between 5 and 15 pages depending on the subject.
wizard.adviceRapport: An internship report is generally between 30 and 50 pages.
wizard.modelDesc: Choose "Flash" for fast generation, or "Pro" for deeper but slower analysis.
wizard.structured: Structured (Generates a plan then writes by parts)
wizard.direct: Direct (Simple and direct response to instructions without a plan)
wizard.tpModeDesc: The "Direct" mode is ideal for short TPs (Q&A, exercises) that do not require a complex structure.
wizard.editPlan: You can edit this plan before starting to write.

planEditor.title: Architecture of Knowledge
planEditor.subtitle: Refine the structure of your thought before starting the final writing.
planEditor.aiInstructions: Give instructions to the AI to reorganize or enrich your plan (e.g., "Add a chapter on economic impact", "Detail chapter 2 more", "Reorganize for a more sociological approach")
planEditor.addSectionIntro: Add a section to the Introduction

generationView.title: The work takes shape
generationView.subtitle: Bayano Academy orchestrates the writing of your document. Each chapter is chiseled to meet the highest academic requirements.
generationView.finishedDesc: Your manuscript is ready. A Word version has been automatically saved in your database.
generationView.writingInProgress: Writing in progress... Do not close this page.
generationView.errorAuth: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
generationView.errorQuota: Gemini quota limit reached. Please wait a minute before clicking 'Retry'. The AI will resume exactly where it left off.

projectDetail.notFound: Project not found or access denied.
projectDetail.connectionError: Unable to connect to the server.
projectDetail.noChaptersExport: No chapters found for export. Please refresh the data.
projectDetail.noStoredWord: No Word version is saved in the database for this project.
projectDetail.aiInstructions: Give instructions to the AI to improve this content (e.g., "Make the tone more academic", "Develop the part on economic impact", "Correct mistakes and rephrase")
projectDetail.wordEditWarning: Warning: Changes made here will not be reflected in individual chapters. They will only be saved in the final Word file.
projectDetail.noContent: No content generated for this section.

chat.title: Bayano AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask questions or analyze documents
chat.placeholder: Ask your question or ask for help...
chat.welcome: Hello! I am Bayano, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

project.noContentDesc: The content could not be retrieved.
project.aiPrompt: What do you want to change in this part?

auth.loginDesc: Enter your credentials to access your work.

antiPlagiarism.title: Anti-Plagiarism & Paraphrasing
antiPlagiarism.subtitle: Detect AI-generated content and rephrase it to ensure the authenticity of your work.
antiPlagiarism.errorEmpty: Please enter text or upload a file.
